name: Green World Coffee Farm
tagline: A working 7-acre coffee farm on a former pineapple plantation — free self-guided tours and freshly roasted Waialua coffee.
talkStory: A working 7-acre coffee farm on former Dole pineapple land in Central Oahu. Free self-guided tours let you walk among coffee trees and see the full bean-to-cup process. The cafe serves freshly roasted Waialua coffee at prices way below Waikiki, and the homemade banana bread is legendary among locals driving to the North Shore. One of the only places on Oahu where you can pick a coffee cherry off the tree and drink the roasted result.
